mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL005 */ COUNT(*) FROM ETINTRA.BB_ACCEPT WHERE BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{bbProductCode} AND BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{bbPresentationFrom}) AND BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{bbBranchCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(LPAD(#{bbAccountNumber}, 7, 0))

insert.foreach: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL012 */ INTO ETINTRA.BB_ACCEPT ( BB_PRODUCT_CODE, BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, BB_BRANCH_CODE, BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BB_DEALER_NUMBER, BB_FAMILY_NAME_KANJI, BB_NAME_KANJI, BB_FAMILY_NAME_KANA, BB_NAME_KANA, BB_QUANTITY, BB_PRICE, BB_DISCOUNT, BB_SEQ, BB_INVESTOR_ATT_NAME, BB_REMARK, BB_CREATE_DATE, BB_CREATE_USER_ID, BB_CREATE_SECTION_ID, BB_CREATE_SECTION_NAME, BB_CREATE_USER_NAME, BB_STRIKE_PRICE ) (SELECT #{param.brandCode}, TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbPresentationFrom}), #{param.butenCode}, #{param.accountNumber}, #{param.dealerNumber}, #{param.uaiFamilyNameKanji}, #{param.uaiNameKanji}, #{param.uaiFamilyNameKana}, #{param.uaiNameKana}, TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbQuantity}), TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbPrice}), TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbDiscount}), TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbSeq}), #{param.bbInvestorAttName}, #{param.bbRemark}, CORDYS.IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{param.userId}, #{param.sectionId}, #{param.sectionName}, #{param.userName}, #{param.bbStrikePrice} FROM DUAL )
